hero.recraft_prompt_if_needed: Professional male American mechanic in uniform working under the hood of a truck in a residential driveway setting, photorealistic, no text or logos, no visible signage. Mobile service van faintly visible in background.
hero.caption_context: Owner or technician in action. Caption should name Joseph (owner) if the photo is of him, or reference 'on every call' / 'mobile, when and where you need it' if generic tech shot.

gallery.context: diesel truck or commercial vehicle — differentiator; caption 'Diesel + Commercial'
fire truck or emergency vehicle — highest-tier differentiator; caption 'Fire Truck + Emergency Vehicle Specialty'
motorcycle or ATV — broad scope signal; caption 'Motorcycles, ATVs, Marine'
tech working in customer driveway with mobile equipment; caption 'Wherever you need us'
nighttime or evening shot if available to reinforce 24/7 positioning; caption 'Open 24/7, 365'
before/after or finished work; caption 'Diagnosed + Fixed · State-of-the-Art'

sections.context: Douglasville or West Atlanta visible; Unsplash OK

notes: Mobile auto repair — hero should show action (not shop interior, since there isn't one). Specialty vehicles (fire truck + marine + diesel) are the single biggest differentiator — wire those prominently in gallery over standard sedan repair shots. If Bruce can access Yelp's 13 photos, prefer those over Recraft.
